## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (0 errors)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run test -- --run` passes
- [ ] Demo Mode still works end-to-end if I touched `src/data/demoData.ts`, the demo toggle, or auth bypass
- [ ] No new top-level dependencies added (or, if added, justified above)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values committed

## Screenshots (UI changes only)

Before / after screenshots help reviewers a lot.
